version_description: A No.6 UK hit in 1980 for the family band - https://youtu.be/tPBDMihPRJA.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Can You Feel The Love Tonight

content:
The Brothers Johnson - Stomp (L.E. Johnson, G.H. Johnson, V.R. Johnson & R.L. Temperton)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you enjoyed this, please add it to your favourites and/or
give a rating to show appreciation for the work that went into providing it for you

Video Here - https://youtu.be/tPBDMihPRJA

A lot of the chord shapes are implied by the riffs being played around the 3rd fret position on
both the guitars in the recording. Typical funk rhthym playing will fit in well with lots of left hand muting.


[Intro]
[ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]  
[ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]     
[ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] repeat

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Gm7[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Steppin' out the weekends open wide, fill it up, let's blast the jams and die[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
While we're cruisin' a-round in the street, listen up for the party beat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
Slap me five that's the place we've ar-rived, it's a-live, everybody take it to the top[/tab]

[Chorus]   
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]
We're gonna stomp        all night      in the neighborhood,    gonna feel alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      
Gonna stomp         all night,    wanna party, till the morning light, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch] 
Runnin', runnin', runnin' (runnin' all night)[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]          
The set is hot, there's people wall to wall, old ones young things short ones standing tall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
So grab the one with the smile on her face and hit the floor and stay right on the case[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
The heat is on and the funk just won't leave us a-lone, everybody take it to the top[/tab]

[Chorus]  
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]
We're gonna stomp        all night      in the neighborhood,    gonna feel alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      
Gonna stomp        all night,      wanna party, till the morning light,    [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Stomp![/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Stomp, step down in it, Put your foot where you feel the fit[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                                                                      [ch]Cm[/ch]
Stomp, you don't want to quit, Put your heels where you're feeling it   (Keyboard Riff)[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]
We're gonna stomp         all night      in the neighborhood,    gonna feel alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      
Gonna stomp all night,    wanna party, till the morning light   Well, well, well[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      
Gonna stomp all night,    wanna party, till the morning light[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]
We're gonna stomp all night    in the neighborhood, don't it feel alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Gonna stomp all night, wanna party, till the morning light,    Stomp![/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Stomp, step down in it, put your foot where you feel the fit[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Stomp, you don't want to quit, put your heel where you're feeling it (take it to the top)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Stomp, step down in it, put your foot where you feel the fit[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
Stomp, you don't want to quit, put your heel where you're feeling it (Repeat & Fade)[/tab]
